overall.description: A nighttime drive through a foggy, futuristic highway in a cyberpunk city. The footage shows wet roads illuminated by distinctive horizontal street lights, with palm-tree covered hillsides and modern buildings, approaching a tunnel checkpoint with neon signage. This is game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane highway with futuristic street lighting

events.description: a dark vehicle overtakes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the wet highway, passing under horizontal LED street lights

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the left side at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall pole with long horizontal LED light bar illuminating the road
cluster of palm trees on the rocky hillside to the left
multi-story building with illuminated windows on the right side

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wet multi-lane highway at night, illuminated by distinctive horizontal street lights. Palm trees line the left hillside while a modern office building stands on the right. The foggy atmosphere creates a moody, cyberpunk ambiance as a vehicle overtakes on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside with palm trees and scattered residential lighting

events.description: camera pans left to view the hillside with palm trees and buildings
camera pans back to face the road ahead

agents.ego_description: turns head to the left to observe the hillside vegetation and distant tower while continuing to drive

entered.detail: houses with warm lights built into the rocky hillside
tall spire structure with red aviation lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a rocky hillside covered with palm trees and scattered residential buildings with warm lights. A tall communication tower is visible in the distance against the foggy night sky. The view then pans back toward the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel entrance with checkpoint barriers and neon signage

events.description: approaching the illuminated tunnel entrance with concrete checkpoint structure
passing the yellow Hudson sign and entering the tunnel approach zone

agents.ego_description: driving toward the tunnel entrance, navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: truck entering the tunnel ahead with brake lights on
orange vehicle parked on the right shoulder near the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete tunnel entrance with red warning lights and metal barriers
purple illuminated advertising pillar with digital display
yellow rectangular road sign with black text reading HUDSON

segments.scene_description: Approaching a tunnel checkpoint with concrete barriers and red warning lights. Neon signage and a yellow Hudson sign mark the entrance as traffic density increases. The camera drives toward the tunnel mouth, passing other vehicles on the wet asphalt while the palm tree hillside recedes to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked highway that transitions from a moody, open cityscape into a congested tunnel checkpoint. It begins by gliding past a modern office building and palm-lined hillsides under the glow of horizontal street lights, while a vehicle overtakes on the left through a thick, cyberpunk fog. As the camera pans left, the view shifts toward a rocky hillside dotted with warm residential lights and a distant communication tower before swinging back to the road ahead. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches a tunnel entrance marked by concrete barriers, red warning lights, and a yellow Hudson sign. Finally, the palm trees recede into the distance as the vehicle merges into denser traffic and drives toward the neon-lit mouth of the tunnel.
